# TechInRent

> TechInRent is a done-for-you LinkedIn lead generation and B2B outreach agency. We run policy-safe LinkedIn outreach, generate qualified B2B leads, manage and optimize LinkedIn profiles and company pages, recover restricted LinkedIn accounts, and support recruiting — primarily for B2B teams in the United States and worldwide. Clients typically go live within 48 hours and receive 5–10 qualified prospects per week.

## What TechInRent does (services)

- **LinkedIn Lead Generation**: Done-for-you outreach that books qualified B2B meetings. Most clients see 5–10 qualified prospects per week. A "qualified lead" is a decision-maker matching the client's Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) who has shown genuine interest. https://techinrent.com/linkedin-lead-generation
- **LinkedIn Outreach Services**: Personalized, human-like connection requests and messaging that stay within LinkedIn's activity limits (policy-safe). https://techinrent.com/linkedin-outreach-services
- **LinkedIn Profile Optimization**: Rewriting and optimizing headlines, About sections, and profiles to convert profile visits into conversations and leads. https://techinrent.com/linkedin-profile-optimization
- **LinkedIn Account Management**: Ongoing day-to-day management of a client's LinkedIn presence and campaigns. https://techinrent.com/linkedin-account-management
- **LinkedIn Account Recovery**: Recovering restricted or banned LinkedIn accounts, with a stated ~95% success rate. https://techinrent.com/linkedin-account-recovery
- **LinkedIn B2B Lead Generation**: Decision-maker outreach for B2B pipelines. https://techinrent.com/linkedin-b2b-lead-generation
- **LinkedIn Company Page Management**: Growing and managing company pages. https://techinrent.com/linkedin-company-page-management
- **LinkedIn Recruitment & Recruiter Support**: Sourcing and outreach support for hiring. https://techinrent.com/linkedin-recruitment-services
- **LinkedIn Personal Branding**: Building authority and inbound interest for founders and executives. https://techinrent.com/linkedin-personal-branding
- **LinkedIn Ads Management** and **Sales Outsourcing**: Paid LinkedIn campaigns and outsourced sales development.

## Key facts

- **Founded focus**: LinkedIn growth, B2B lead generation, and profile management.
- **Primary market**: United States (also United Kingdom and worldwide).
- **Onboarding**: Clients are typically live within 48 hours.
- **Results**: 5–10 qualified prospects per week once campaigns are optimized; results vary by offer and market.
- **Account safety**: All outreach is policy-safe — within LinkedIn's activity limits, human-like sending patterns, no spam.
- **Account recovery success rate**: ~95%.
- **Contracts**: Month-to-month, no long-term lock-ins.
- **Social proof**: 500+ clients served, 98% satisfaction.
- **Pricing currency**: USD.

## Who it's for

B2B founders, sales teams, agencies, recruiters, and consultants in the US and worldwide who want a predictable source of qualified meetings from LinkedIn without doing the outreach themselves.
